Houses ,of Prosperity
The tamous astrologer Pandit Gopesh Kumar Ojha has brought out
the meanings of Upachaya and Apachaya - Upachaya is increase to
heap or prosperity and Apachaya is decrease to heap or adversity. When
these terms are applied to specific houses. we come face to face with
one of the greatest misconceptions of Indian Astrology. Upachayas or
houses of prosperity have been taken as the 3"', the 6tn, the 10tn and
the utt~ calculated from the Ascendant. No astrologer from Ja inini to
modem times has departed from the beaten track except Varaha Mihira.
In Sloka 16 of Chapter 1 of Brihat)ataka. Varaha Mihira has given the
usual definition but added "no niyam eke. . to suggest that some
astrolOgers held different views in the matter. He, hOweve~; has not
